texto: BERNARD. (To DONALD.) Donald, read any new libraries lately?DONALD. One or three. I did the complete works of Doris Lessing this week. I've been depressed.[. . .]BERNARD. Some people eat, some people drink, and some take dope.DONALD. I read.MICHAEL. And read and read and read. It's a wonder your eyes don't turn back in your head at the sight of a book jacket.HANK. Well, at least he's a constructive escapist.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Mart Crowley que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “BERNARD. (To DONALD.) Donald, read any new libraries lately?DONALD. One or three. I did the compl…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre trabalho, bibliophilia, bookworms, com foco em trabalho e bookworms.
